name: Insight Communication Playbook Lens
summary: Insight Communication Playbook Lens gives data / analytics work a clearer decision structure.
whenToUseIt: Use this when the team needs a stronger way to reason about insight communication playbook lens without adding unnecessary complexity.
steps: Map the signal and constraints that matter most.
Choose the smallest next move that improves the system.
Review the output and tighten the loop.
example: A team applies Insight Communication Playbook Lens to sort noise from signal and decide which change should happen first.
